features: Package Includes: You will receive 3 exfoliating bath nets in two colors of black,pink and coffee,which is very practical mesh body exfoliator tool, suitable for treating impurities and unclogging pores.

Premium Materials: Our sponge net is made of safe and high-quality nylon material, durable, lightweight and elastic,and it is elastic and stretchable that will be longer after being stretched, great for washing all areas of the body.

Net Sponge: Our exfoliating shower body scrub won't cause damage to your skin, keeping skin smooth and healthy. And with its rougher surface texture, special mesh design, the bath net sponge can effectively clean the skin, which can perfectly remove dead skin and dirt all over the body.

Thoughtful Design:bath sponge nets are simply clean and stored easily, and they can be dried quickly due to their porous nature. Also you can cut back scrubber for shower freely to make different sizes of scrubbing towels as needed.

Wide Application: Bath sponge is suitable for men and women of most ages and is suitable for all types of skin. Long-term use can remove the dirt and oil blocking the skin, remove the skin surface metabolic dead skin,suitable for any color person, please be aware of the touchness especially first using people.
